```{=html}
<div class="share-buttons">
<span class="share-label">Share:</span>
<a href="#" class="share-btn share-bluesky" data-share="bluesky" aria-label="Share on Bluesky" title="Share on Bluesky">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 600 530" fill="currentColor"><path d="M135.72 44.03C202.216 93.951 273.74 195.17 300 249.49c26.262-54.318 97.782-155.54 164.28-205.46C512.26 8.009 590 -19.862 590 68.825c0 17.708-10.155 148.79-16.111 170.07-20.703 73.984-96.144 92.854-163.25 81.433 117.298 19.964 147.198 86.092 82.777 152.22-122.51 125.71-176.108-31.545-189.881-71.858-2.502-7.312-3.674-10.734-3.535-7.822-.139-2.912-1.311.51-3.813 7.822-13.773 40.313-67.371 197.568-189.881 71.858-64.421-66.128-34.521-132.256 82.777-152.22-67.106 11.421-142.547-7.449-163.25-81.433C20.155 217.615 10 86.533 10 68.825c0-88.687 77.74-60.816 125.72-24.795z"/></svg>
<span>Bluesky</span>
</a>
<a href="#" class="share-btn share-linkedin" data-share="linkedin" aria-label="Share on LinkedIn" title="Share on LinkedIn">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/></svg>
<span>LinkedIn</span>
</a>
<button type="button" class="share-btn share-copy" data-share="copy" aria-label="Copy link" title="Copy link">
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg>
<span class="share-copy-label">Copy link</span>
</button>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  var scripts = document.querySelectorAll('.share-buttons');
  var container = scripts[scripts.length - 1];
  if (!container || container.dataset.wired) return;
  container.dataset.wired = 'true';

  var url = window.location.href;
  var title = document.title.replace(/\s*[–-]\s*Julio Garbers\s*$/, '');

  var bluesky = container.querySelector('.share-bluesky');
  bluesky.href = 'https://bsky.app/intent/compose?text=' + encodeURIComponent(title + ' ' + url);
  bluesky.target = '_blank';
  bluesky.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';

  var linkedin = container.querySelector('.share-linkedin');
  linkedin.href = 'https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=' + encodeURIComponent(url);
  linkedin.target = '_blank';
  linkedin.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';

  var copyBtn = container.querySelector('.share-copy');
  var copyLabel = container.querySelector('.share-copy-label');
  copyBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(function() {
      var original = copyLabel.textContent;
      copyLabel.textContent = 'Copied!';
      copyBtn.classList.add('share-copied');
      setTimeout(function() {
        copyLabel.textContent = original;
        copyBtn.classList.remove('share-copied');
      }, 1800);
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
